pages.full_text:
Then we went to lunch with Angela Sills. She has a gorgeous house, moated, + garden. Her husband, Tim + sons, James [?Robert] (Skill) [?Robert] Michael (Durham 20) were at a Young Farmer Agricultural Show. We walked around the Farm + Joseph sat on a digger + a tractor. Her men returned at 2.30. by which time William + Joseph had set off back to London. Lovely Green Man + Sungoddes in her garden + plans.

   3.45. We drove south down the hills into the Thames Estuary + camp at [?At] Bulphan [?Ha] Hall Farm. 2 crashes. The campsite is in a pretty area. It's very green. More warm sunshine.

Monday 19th May
   We drove into Docklands. It was interesting to view London arriving from the east. Poor Tinder was trapped in the loo while we looked at the Excel exhibition where Swafer had a stand with Chad on it. Simon + I
pages.notes: Text continues from a previous page — opening line has no heading. 'Sungoddes' likely 'Sungoddes' or 'Sun goddess' — transcribed as written. 'Bulphan Hall Farm' — could read 'At Bulphan Hall Farm'; a crossing-out precedes 'Hall Farm'. 'Swafer' uncertain — could be a company name or personal name. 'Chad' may refer to a product/display item at the Excel stand. Year cannot be confirmed from page alone; Monday 19th May fell on e.g. 2008 or 2014 within the volume's range.

pages.full_text:
looked around + Simon liked a round table with laminated wood showing by Jason Heap who lives on the Isle of Wight. He met him. I went back to the van + read. We had lunch + set off north, stopping for tea on the way. We got home + Simon mowed the lawn before the church Book Club came.

Friday June 6th.
   3.10. Simon, Eve + Tinder set off for Charles'. 2 flats at [?Suns] Tew. There we arrived just before William + Bryony, Joseph + Seb. Then John came. Finally Charles, who later collected Jenny. Jenny had cooked a delicious big lasagna + salad + W + B mortgaged the house + brought me a yummy cake from Conditor + Cooke. I had lovely presents. Sensible people fell into bed + Charles + Jenny + John went off to the pub. Poor Charles had had an exam that day.
June 7th. I was fast asleep + Simon shaving when Bryony arrived at 8 with the Z boys
pages.notes: Text is a continuation from left page (mid-sentence at top). '[?Suns] Tew' is uncertain — could be 'Steeple Tew', 'Upper Tew', 'Lower Tew', or similar Oxfordshire village; transcribed as read. 'Conditor + Cooke' appears to be a patisserie or bakery name. 'Z boys' likely refers to children with surname beginning with Z. 'W + B mortgaged the house' — likely means W(illiam) + B(ryony). Year not determinable from content alone; Friday June 6th fell on e.g. 2008 or 2014 in the volume range.
